name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Post Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Central Government scholarship for SC students pursuing post-matriculation courses. Covers tuition fees, maintenance allowance, and other charges.
benefits: Full tuition fee + maintenance allowance of ₹550-1200/month
eligibility_criteria: Must belong to SC category. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year. Min 50% in last qualifying exam.

name: NSP - Post Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: Scholarship for OBC students pursuing post-matriculation studies at recognized institutions in India.
benefits: Full tuition + exam fees + maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Must belong to OBC category (non-creamy layer). Family income ≤ ₹1 lakh/year.

name: NSP - Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship
description: Merit-based scholarship for college and university students from families with limited income. Top 20th percentile of 12th class exam scorers.
eligibility_criteria: Must be in top 20th percentile of 12th board exam. Family income ≤ ₹8 lakh/year.

name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme (PMSS)
description: Scholarship for dependent wards of ex-servicemen/ex-coast guard personnel for professional courses.
eligibility_criteria: Ward of ex-serviceman/ex-coast guard. Min 60% in 12th. Pursuing professional course (MBBS, Engineering, MBA, etc).

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
description: AICTE scholarship exclusively for girl students pursuing technical education (degree/diploma) at AICTE-approved institutions.
eligibility_criteria: Girl student admitted to 1st year of AICTE-approved technical institution. Family income ≤ ₹8 lakh/year. Max 2 girl children per family.

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship for Disabled
description: Scholarship for differently-abled students pursuing technical education at AICTE-approved institutions.
eligibility_criteria: Differently-abled student (40%+ disability). Admitted to AICTE-approved institution. Family income ≤ ₹8 lakh/year.

name: Maulana Azad National Fellowship (MANF)
description: Fellowship for minority community students pursuing M.Phil/Ph.D in sciences, humanities, social sciences.
eligibility_criteria: Minority community student. Must have cleared UGC-NET/JRF. Family income ≤ ₹6 lakh/year.

name: Begum Hazrat Mahal National Scholarship
description: For meritorious girl students belonging to minority communities studying in classes 9 to 12.
eligibility_criteria: Girl student from minority community. Min 50% marks. Family income ≤ ₹2 lakh/year.

name: Reliance Foundation Undergraduate Scholarship
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship for students pursuing undergraduate studies in engineering, computer science, mathematics, and sciences.
benefits: Up to ₹2 lakh/year for 4 years + mentorship + networking
eligibility_criteria: 1st year UG student in STEM. Family income ≤ ₹15 lakh/year. Min 60% in 12th.

name: Tata Trusts Scholarship
description: Need-based scholarship for underprivileged students pursuing professional courses at select institutions.
benefits: 80% of tuition fee + hostel charges for the entire duration
eligibility_criteria: Admitted to recognized institution. Family income ≤ ₹4 lakh/year. Min 60% in last qualifying exam.

name: Swami Dayanand Education Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarship for B.Tech/MBBS students who scored 80%+ in Class 12 from specific boards.
eligibility_criteria: B.Tech or MBBS student. 80%+ in 12th. Family income ≤ ₹5 lakh/year.

name: HDFC Bank Parivartan's ECS Scholarship
description: Scholarship for students from underprivileged sections across school, UG, PG and professional courses.
benefits: Up to ₹75,000/year covering tuition, hostel, books
eligibility_criteria: Min 55% in last exam. Family income ≤ ₹8 lakh/year.

name: Kotak Kanya Scholarship
description: For meritorious girl students from underprivileged backgrounds pursuing professional courses like Engineering, Medicine, Architecture, etc.
benefits: Up to ₹1.5 lakh/year for professional course duration
eligibility_criteria: Girl student admitted to 1st year professional course. Min 75% in 12th. Family income ≤ ₹3.5 lakh/year.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship (Innovation in Science Pursuit)
description: DST scholarship for meritorious students pursuing BSc, BS, Int MSc in natural & basic sciences.
eligibility_criteria: Top 1% in 12th board exam OR JEE/NEET rank holder. Pursuing BSc/Int MSc in natural sciences.

name: Kishore Vaigyanik Protsahan Yojana (KVPY)
description: National fellowship program for students interested in pursuing research career in basic sciences.
eligibility_criteria: Must clear KVPY aptitude test. Pursuing/planning BSc in basic sciences. Min 75% in 12th (65% for SC/ST).

name: ISHAN UDAY Scholarship for North Eastern Region
description: UGC scholarship for students from NE states pursuing UG courses outside their home state.
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of NE states. Family income ≤ ₹4.5 lakh/year. Admitted to UG course.

name: Indira Gandhi Scholarship for Single Girl Child
description: UGC scholarship for single girl child pursuing non-professional PG courses in recognized universities.
eligibility_criteria: Must be single girl child (or one of twin girls). Pursuing non-professional PG course. Age ≤ 30 years.

name: Post Graduate Indira Gandhi Scholarship for Single Girl Child
description: For single girl child pursuing PG programs. Promotes higher education for girls.
eligibility_criteria: Single girl child. Pursuing PG in non-professional course at recognized university.

name: Sitaram Jindal Foundation Scholarship
description: Need-based scholarship for Indian students pursuing education from Class 1 to Post Graduation, Doctorate and vocational courses.
eligibility_criteria: Indian national. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year. Min 60% in qualifying exam.

name: LIC Golden Jubilee Scholarship
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship for economically weaker students pursuing higher education in India.
benefits: ₹20,000/year for 3 years for regular scholars, ₹10,000/year for special scholars
eligibility_criteria: Min 60% in 12th. Family income ≤ ₹2 lakh/year. Pursuing UG degree.

name: Vidyasaarathi Scholarship (NSDL e-Gov)
description: Platform for various corporate scholarships in engineering, management, commerce and other professional courses.
eligibility_criteria: Indian national. Min 60% in last exam. Family income ≤ ₹6 lakh/year. Varies by specific scheme.

name: Wipro Earthian Sustainability Scholarship
description: Scholarship acknowledging young leaders working on sustainability and environmental challenges.
eligibility_criteria: Indian UG student interested in sustainability. Min 60% in qualifying exam.

name: Infosys InStep Scholarship
description: Scholarship for meritorious engineering students from premier institutions in India.
eligibility_criteria: 3rd/4th year engineering student from top-tier institution. Min 75% or 7.5 CGPA.

name: Google Generation Scholarship (APAC)
description: For students in CS/related fields who demonstrate strong academic background, leadership, and financial need.
eligibility_criteria: Full-time UG/PG in CS, CE, or related field. Strong academic performance (min 70%). Community leadership.

name: Adobe India Women in Technology Scholarship
description: For female students pursuing undergraduate education in technology at Indian universities.
benefits: INR 1 Lakh + internship opportunity at Adobe
eligibility_criteria: Female UG student in CS/IT/related field at recognized Indian university. Min 70% or 7.0 CGPA.

name: ONGC Scholarship for SC/ST Students
description: Scholarship for SC/ST students pursuing professional courses like Engineering, Medical, and MBA.
benefits: ₹48,000/year for general degree, ₹60,000/year for professional courses
eligibility_criteria: SC/ST student in professional course. Family income ≤ ₹4.8 lakh/year. Min 60% in qualifying exam.

name: NTPC Scholarship for Engineering Students
description: For SC/ST/OBC students studying in full-time engineering degree courses at AICTE-approved institutions.
eligibility_criteria: SC/ST/OBC student in AICTE-approved engineering college. Family income ≤ ₹5 lakh/year.

name: IOCL Academic Scholarship for SC/ST Students
description: Indian Oil Corporation scholarship for SC/ST students pursuing 10+/Graduation in engineering/medical/business.
eligibility_criteria: SC/ST student pursuing professional UG course. Family income ≤ ₹3 lakh/year. Min 55% in qualifying exam.

name: Maulana Azad National Scholarship for Minority Girls
description: Financial support for meritorious minority girl students who have secured 55%+ in previous exam.
eligibility_criteria: Minority girl student. Family income ≤ ₹2 lakh/year. Min 55% in qualifying exam.

name: Narotam Sekhsaria Foundation Scholarship
description: Zero-interest loan scholarship for PG studies in India and overseas for all streams.
benefits: Interest-free loan up to ₹20 lakh for Indian PG, ₹25 lakh for international PG
eligibility_criteria: Indian national with strong academic record (min 65%). Admission to recognized PG program.

name: Azim Premji Foundation Fellowship
description: Fellowship for graduates willing to work in education sector in rural India.
benefits: Monthly stipend + accommodation + training in education development
eligibility_criteria: Graduate in any discipline. Willingness to work in rural India for 2 years.

name: SOF Scholarship (Science Olympiad Foundation)
description: Scholarships through national/international Olympiad exams in science, math, and computer science.
eligibility_criteria: Must participate and rank in SOF Olympiad exams. Available for school and junior college students.

name: KVPY (INSPIRE) – Science Talent Search
description: National program to identify students with scientific talent for pursuing research career.
benefits: ₹5,000/month during BSc, ₹7,000/month during MSc + contingency grant
eligibility_criteria: Must clear INSPIRE aptitude test. Studying basic sciences at recognized institution.

name: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
description: Education loan scheme by Bihar government for students from Bihar pursuing higher education.
benefits: Education loan up to ₹4 lakh at 4% interest (1% for girls, SC/ST/divyang)
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Bihar. Passed 12th from Bihar board. Admitted to recognized institution.

name: West Bengal Kanyashree Prakalpa
description: West Bengal state scholarship for girl students to promote female education and prevent child marriage.
eligibility_criteria: Girl student from WB. Family income ≤ ₹1.2 lakh/year. Must be unmarried and enrolled in school.

name: UP Scholarship (Post Matric)
description: Uttar Pradesh state scholarship for students pursuing post-matriculation education in recognized institutions.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement + maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of UP. Family income varies by category. Min 50% in qualifying exam.

name: Maharashtra State Scholarship (Rajarshi Shahu Maharaj)
description: Government of Maharashtra scholarship for OBC/SEBC students for higher education.
benefits: Full tuition fee + exam fee + maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Maharashtra. OBC/SEBC category. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: Karnataka Vidyasiri Scholarship
description: Post-matric scholarship for SC/ST/OBC students from Karnataka for higher education.
eligibility_criteria: Karnataka domicile. SC/ST/OBC student. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: Tamil Nadu government Scholarship for SC/ST
description: Post-matric scholarship for SC/ST students from Tamil Nadu pursuing higher education.
benefits: Full tuition fee + hostel charges + special allowance
eligibility_criteria: Tamil Nadu domicile. SC/ST category. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: Rajasthan Ambedkar DBT Voucher Scheme
description: Residential and teaching support vouchers for SC/ST/OBC students studying outside their home district.
eligibility_criteria: Rajasthan domicile. SC/ST/OBC. Studying outside home district. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: Telangana State Overseas Scholarship
description: Scholarship for meritorious BC/SC/ST students from Telangana for pursuing MS/MBA/PG abroad.
benefits: Full funding for abroad PG (tuition + living expenses up to ₹20 lakh)
eligibility_criteria: Telangana domicile. SC/ST/OBC category. Admission to foreign university for PG.

name: Kerala State Government Scholarship for Minorities
description: Scholarship for minority students from Kerala for pursuing higher education within and outside the state.
eligibility_criteria: Kerala domicile. Minority community student. Family income ≤ ₹4 lakh/year.

name: AP Jnanabhumi Scholarship
description: Andhra Pradesh state scholarship for EBC/Kapu/Minority/SC/ST students pursuing higher education.
eligibility_criteria: AP domicile. Specific community. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: Foundation for Academic Excellence and Access (FAEA)
description: Financial and academic support for meritorious students from marginalised sections at premier institutions.
benefits: Full tuition + living expenses + mentorship at IITs/IIMs/NITs/top colleges
eligibility_criteria: Admission to premier institution (IIT/NIT/IIM/AIIMS). SC/ST/OBC. Family income ≤ ₹4 lakh/year.

name: Sir Ratan Tata Trust Scholarship
description: Loan scholarship for Indian students pursuing higher education (PG/research) at reputed institutions.
benefits: Interest-free loan covering tuition + living + travel
eligibility_criteria: Indian national. Admission to reputed PG/PhD program. Family income ≤ ₹6 lakh/year.

name: JN Tata Endowment for Higher Education
description: Loan scholarship for Indian students pursuing PG/doctoral studies abroad at top-ranked universities.
benefits: Loan up to ₹10 lakh + travel grant. Partial gift if repaid on time.
eligibility_criteria: Indian national with good academic record. Admission to a recognized overseas university.

name: Buddy4Study India STEM Scholarship
description: Scholarship for undergraduate students pursuing STEM education, funded by multiple corporate partners.
eligibility_criteria: Indian national. Pursuing STEM UG degree. Family income ≤ ₹8 lakh/year. Min 60% in 12th.

name: AICTE Swanath Scholarship for Orphans
description: Scholarship scheme for orphans, wards of armed forces/CAPF in action, and single parent family students.
eligibility_criteria: Orphan / ward of armed forces/CAPF martyr / single parent family. Pursuing AICTE-approved technical course.

name: Fair & Lovely (Glow & Lovely) Career Foundation Scholarship
description: Scholarship for women between 15-30 years of age pursuing education or skill development courses.
benefits: Up to ₹2.5 lakh for college education or skill courses
eligibility_criteria: Female candidate aged 15-30. Family income ≤ ₹6 lakh/year. Min 50% in qualifying exam.

name: Internshala Career Scholarship
description: Annual scholarship for students pursuing any degree program, selected via online test and interview.
eligibility_criteria: Indian student enrolled in UG/PG program. Min 55% aggregate. Clear aptitude test + interview.

name: Mahindra All India Talent Scholarship
description: Merit-cum-means scholarship for diploma and degree engineering students at recognized institutions.
eligibility_criteria: Pursuing diploma/degree engineering at AICTE-approved institution. Family income ≤ ₹12 lakh/year.

name: CSIR-UGC NET Junior Research Fellowship (JRF)
description: National fellowship for candidates qualifying CSIR-UGC NET for pursuing research in sciences.
eligibility_criteria: MSc/equivalent with 55% (50% for SC/ST/OBC). Must qualify CSIR-UGC NET. Age ≤ 28 years.

name: Jamsetji Tata Scholarship for Higher Education Abroad
description: Full scholarship for meritorious Indian students pursuing PG/PhD at top international universities.
benefits: Full tuition fees + living expenses + air fare (varies)
eligibility_criteria: Indian national. Unconditional offer from a top-ranked international university. Exceptional academic record.

name: North South Foundation Scholarship
description: Need-based scholarship for engineering, medical, polytechnic and general degree students across India.
eligibility_criteria: Economically weaker student. Pursuing UG degree. Family income ≤ ₹2 lakh/year. Academic merit.

name: SOA National Scholarship (Siksha O Anusandhan)
description: Merit scholarship for students securing admission to Siksha O Anusandhan deemed university programs.
benefits: 25%-100% tuition fee waiver based on entrance rank
eligibility_criteria: Admission through SOA entrance test or JEE/NEET rank. Merit-based fee waiver.

name: MahaDBT Rajarshi Chhatrapati Shahu Maharaj Shikshan Shulkh Shishyavrutti Yojna (EBC)
description: Provides 50% tuition fee and exam fee reimbursement to EBC students from Maharashtra studying in professional/non-professional courses.
benefits: 50% Tuition Fees and 50% Exam Fees reimbursement
eligibility_criteria: Must be a domicile of Maharashtra. Admitted through CAP round. Family income ≤ ₹8 lakh/year.

name: SSP Post Matric Scholarship for SC/ST (Karnataka)
description: Financial assistance to SC/ST students of Karnataka pursuing post-matriculation courses.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement + maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Karnataka. Belonging to SC/ST. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: OASIS Post Matric Scholarship to SC/ST/OBC (West Bengal)
description: Scholarship scheme by Backward Classes Welfare Department, West Bengal for SC/ST/OBC students.
benefits: Maintenance allowance and tuition fee coverage
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of West Bengal. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh for SC/ST and ₹1 lakh for OBC.

name: UP Scholarship - Post Matric (Uttar Pradesh)
description: Financial support for students of Uttar Pradesh pursuing Post-Matric (Class 11, 12, UG, PG) courses.
benefits: Tuition fee reimbursement and monthly allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of UP. Family income ≤ ₹2 lakh (₹2.5 lakh for SC/ST).

name: Mukhya Mantri Medhavi Vidyarthi Yojna (MMVY) (Madhya Pradesh)
description: Scheme for meritorious students of MP to get their full UG tuition fees paid by the government.
benefits: Full tuition fee waiver for Engineering, Medical, and other UG courses
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of MP. Min 75% in 12th (MP Board) or 85% (CBSE/ICSE). Family income ≤ ₹6 lakh/year.

name: Digital Gujarat Post Matric Scholarship
description: Various post-matric scholarship schemes for SC, ST, OBC, and EBC students of Gujarat.
benefits: Tuition fee and exam fee coverage + maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Gujarat. Income limit varies by category (₹2.5L for SC/ST, ₹1L for OBC).

name: Suvarna Jubilee Merit Scholarship (Kerala)
description: Merit scholarship for BPL students in Kerala pursuing UG or PG courses in Govt/Aided colleges.
eligibility_criteria: First year UG/PG student in Govt/Aided college. Must belong to BPL family.

name: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
description: Educational loan up to ₹4 Lakh at nominal interest rates for 12th pass students from Bihar.
benefits: Loan up to ₹4 Lakh for higher education (1% interest for girls, transgender, divyang)
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Bihar. Passed 12th from a school in Bihar. Age ≤ 25 years.

name: Dr. Ambedkar Post Matric Scholarship for SC (Punjab)
description: Scholarship for SC students of Punjab pursuing post-matriculation courses.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement + maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Punjab. Belong to SC category. Family income ≤ ₹2.5 lakh/year.

name: PRERANA Post Matric Scholarship (Odisha)
description: Financial assistance for SC/ST/OBC/SEBC/EBC students in Odisha pursuing post-matric studies.
benefits: Tuition fee waiver and maintenance allowance
eligibility_criteria: Domicile of Odisha. Income limit varies by category (₹2.5L for SC/ST, ₹1.5L for OBC).
